66 _25 CMTS_SW (25) Comatose: Admission CHAR 1 A code indicating whether the patient is diagnosed as comatose or in a persistent vegetative state at the time of admission. 0 = No, 1 = Yes
67 _26 DLRS_SW (26) Delirious: Admission CHAR 1 A code indicating whether the patient has exhibited symptoms of delirium at time of admission. Delirium may be
